purpose: Language-neutral contract for optional adapter/back-end capability descriptors. These descriptors let Go, TypeScript, and Rust expose the same runtime extension boundaries as the Python reference without forcing heavy SDK dependencies into core.
non_goals: This fixture does not require live Postgres, MySQL, S3, Docker, Kubernetes, E2B, MCP, LangGraph, LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen, LlamaIndex, or Semantic Kernel dependencies.
Concrete production adapters may live in optional packages or be injected by the application, while runtime core owns contracts, policy, audit, evidence, and fail-closed behavior.
